Settings & Backup
Data backup · display options · restore
💾 Data Backup
⚠ Your data is only stored in this browser. Export a backup to protect it.
📤 Export Full Backup
Saves all data: assets, transactions, crypto buys, fitness logs, journal entries, debt payments
📥 Restore from Backup
Load a previously exported backup file. This will overwrite all current data.
Last export: never

Font size
